items.summary: The letter/message panel revealed after the envelope opens must remain fixed and perfectly centered in the viewport at all times — it must not shift, drift, slide, or animate its position after the reveal. The panel's centering must be enforced with stable, non-animated positioning (e.g., fixed positioning with transform-based centering) so that no keyframe, state change, or re-render can cause it to move from the center of the screen.
